extDescription.message: Quickly delete Gemini conversations with a shortcut

customShortcutDesc.message: Pick the shortcut you want to use when deleting conversations inside Gemini.

customShortcutHintRecord.message: Recording now. Press Escape to cancel.

customShortcutHintIdle.message: Press Enter to record a new shortcut.

showTrashIcon.message: Show delete button in chat list

showTrashIconDesc.message: Add a visible delete button to each Gemini conversation for faster one-click cleanup.
